title: Senior Financial Analyst - EY India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - EY India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
EY India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EY India:
EY India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EY India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
